description: Zumba is a fitness brand focused on dance-based workouts, instructor-led classes, and related training programs. Its public website is centered on classes, instructors, and consumer-facing fitness offerings.
summary: Zumba exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.zumba.com/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on `zumba.com`.
